name: Highspot Sales Enablement API
what_it_does: Highspot REST API for AI-powered sales enablement and content management platform. Enables AI agents to query and retrieve sales content and pitches, access engagement analytics, manage content spots, and integrate Highspot data into CRM and sales workflow automation. Highspot competes directly with Seismic and is known for its AI-powered content recommendations.
use_cases: Retrieving sales pitches and content recommendations from sales workflow agents
Accessing buyer engagement analytics from revenue intelligence agents
Managing content spots and collections from marketing operations agents
Integrating Highspot content performance data into CRM opportunity agents
not_for: SMB without enterprise sales enablement needs
best_when: An enterprise revenue team using Highspot wants AI agents to surface relevant content, track buyer engagement, and integrate enablement data into sales CRM workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Buyer engagement tracking collects behavioral data. Enterprise-only platform requiring Highspot agreement.

auth.notes: Highspot API uses OAuth 2.0. Developer access through Highspot developer portal. Enterprise Highspot account required.

pricing.notes: Enterprise-only platform. Pricing per seat negotiated with Highspot sales.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in enterprise portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Buyer engagement behavioral data from content tracking
No public MCP server — enterprise OAuth2 REST API required
API documentation not publicly available — enterprise customers only
Highspot content model (Spots, Pitches, Lists) requires understanding before integration
API access requires Highspot enterprise agreement and developer portal registration
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Buyer engagement tracking. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 with scopes. EU data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Buyer engagement data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 with scopes.
